mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO mcp_tool_logs (invocation_id, user_id, access_key_id, tool_name, knowledge_base_id, document_id, request_summary, result_summary, status, error_message, duration_ms, created_at) VALUES (#{log.invocationId}, #{log.userId}, #{log.accessKeyId}, #{log.toolName}, #{log.knowledgeBaseId}, #{log.documentId}, #{log.requestSummary}, #{log.resultSummary}, #{log.status}, #{log.errorMessage}, #{log.durationMs}, #{log.createdAt})
